meta.question: Are there deprecated elements under APS Conceptual Design that should be archived?
meta.finalAnswer:
Yes, there are deprecated elements under APS Conceptual Design that should be archived. I found 2 deprecated packages:

1. **SH Reference Beam Collection (deprecated)** - Located at: TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System::Systems Engineering::01 Components::Operational::APS::Conceptual Design::Configuration Tables::Wavefront Calibration Lookup Table::SH Reference Beam Collection (deprecated)

2. **PIT Reference Beam Collection (deprecated)** - Located at: TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System::Systems Engineering::01 Components::Operational::APS::Conceptual Design::Configuration Tables::Wavefront Calibration Lookup Table::PIT Reference Beam Collection (deprecated)

Both are packages under the "Wavefront Calibration Lookup Table" folder within APS Conceptual Design's Configuration Tables. These should be reviewed and archived.

Note: There is also one additional deprecated element in the APS area but outside Conceptual Design - "Software Architecture (deprecated)" under APS Realization Design.

events.output: I'll help you find deprecated elements under APS Conceptual Design. Let me start by exploring the model to locate this element and understand its structure.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS Conceptual Design"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Conceptual"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "Conceptual%20Design" .
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?elem), "APS"))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "Conceptual%20Design" .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?elem), "APS"))
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?child ?childType ?childName WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "Conceptual%20Design" .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?pkg), "APS"))
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?child .
  ?child rdf:type ?childType .
  OPTIONAL { ?child vocab:NamedElement_name ?childName }
}
LIMIT 50

SELECT DISTINCT ?child ?childType ?childName WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "Conceptual%20Design" .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?pkg), "APS"))
  ?pkg vocab:Package_packagedElement ?child .
  ?child rdf:type ?childType .
  OPTIONAL { ?child vocab:NamedElement_name ?childName }
}
LIMIT 50

PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?child ?childType ?childName WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "Conceptual%20Design" .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?pkg), "APS"))
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?child .
  ?child rdf:type ?childType .
  ?child vocab:NamedElement_name ?childName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?childName)), LCASE("deprecated")))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?comment ?body WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "Conceptual%20Design" .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?pkg), "APS"))
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?child .
  ?comment rdf:type vocab:comment .
  ?comment vocab:Comment_annotatedElement ?child .
  OPTIONAL { ?comment vocab:Comment_body ?body }
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?child ?childType ?childName WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "Conceptual%20Design" .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?pkg), "APS"))
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?child .
  ?child rdf:type ?childType .
  OPTIONAL { ?child vocab:NamedElement_name ?childName }
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?childName)), LCASE("old")) || 
         CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?childName)), LCASE("obsolete")) || 
         CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?childName)), LCASE("superseded")) ||
         CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?childName)), LCASE("to-be")) ||
         CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?childName)), LCASE("archive")))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?child ?childType ?childName WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "Conceptual%20Design" .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?pkg), "APS"))
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?child .
  ?child rdf:type ?childType .
  OPTIONAL { ?child vocab:NamedElement_name ?childName }
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?childName)), LCASE("to-be")))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("to-be")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("to-be")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Conceptual")))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("as-is")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("deprecated")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")) || CONTAINS(STR(?elem), "APS"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?elem ?type ?name ?parentName WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("deprecated")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?elem), "APS"))
  OPTIONAL {
    ?elem vocab:Element_owner ?parent .
    ?parent vocab:NamedElement_name ?parentName .
  }
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("deprecated")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?elem), "APS") && CONTAINS(STR(?elem), "Conceptual%20Design"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?elem ?type ?name ?qualifiedName WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName ?qualifiedName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("deprecated")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?elem), "APS") && CONTAINS(STR(?elem), "Conceptual%20Design"))
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: Found deprecated elements under APS Conceptual Design by searching for elements with "deprecated" in their name within the APS Conceptual Design path. Identified 2 deprecated packages that should be archived.

request.answer:
Yes, there are deprecated elements under APS Conceptual Design that should be archived. I found 2 deprecated packages:

1. **SH Reference Beam Collection (deprecated)** - Located at: TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System::Systems Engineering::01 Components::Operational::APS::Conceptual Design::Configuration Tables::Wavefront Calibration Lookup Table::SH Reference Beam Collection (deprecated)

2. **PIT Reference Beam Collection (deprecated)** - Located at: TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System::Systems Engineering::01 Components::Operational::APS::Conceptual Design::Configuration Tables::Wavefront Calibration Lookup Table::PIT Reference Beam Collection (deprecated)

Both are packages under the "Wavefront Calibration Lookup Table" folder within APS Conceptual Design's Configuration Tables. These should be reviewed and archived.

Note: There is also one additional deprecated element in the APS area but outside Conceptual Design - "Software Architecture (deprecated)" under APS Realization Design.
